jurisdiction: Loudoun County, Virginia — Board of Supervisors

primary_source.system: Dual-system: eScribe (Standing Committees) + Laserfiche WebLink (BOS Business Meetings)

how_to_enumerate_meetings.escribe_committees: GET https://pub-loudoun.escribemeetings.com — calendar page lists upcoming and past meetings for Finance/Government Operations & Economic Development Committee and Transportation and Land Use Committee. Individual meeting pages at Meeting.aspx?Id={GUID}&lang=English. POST to MeetingsCalendarView.aspx/GetCalendarMeetings returns empty (calendar rendered client-side via FullCalendar JS).
how_to_enumerate_meetings.bos_business_meetings: Laserfiche WebLink folder at https://lfportal.loudoun.gov/LFPortalinternet/0/fol/98907/Row1.aspx — embedded iframe on https://www.loudoun.gov/3426/Board-of-Supervisors-Meetings. Agenda packets posted by Thursday prior to meeting; Action Reports posted within 2 business days after.

sample_document_urls: https://pub-loudoun.escribemeetings.com/Meeting.aspx?Id=5cefff5d-2b42-4aa7-9598-c549cc7b849f&lang=English  (Finance/Gov Ops & Econ Dev Committee — July 14, 2026; contains structured agenda items with attachments, MotionText/MovedBy/SecondedBy/MotionVot CSS classes indicating per-item vote capture)

second_source.system: Per-meeting Board minutes — Laserfiche WebLink (a distinct document from the Action Report, produced by the Clerk and approved by the Board at a subsequent meeting)
second_source.how_to_locate: The year folder RSS (2026: folder 1966224; 2025: 1947831) lists per-meeting folders ('MM-DD-YY Business Meeting', link carries startid={folder_id}). Each meeting folder's RSS (/LFPortalinternet/rss/dbid/0/folder/{id}/feed.rss) lists a 'MM-DD-YY Business Meeting Minutes' document alongside the Action Report the primary reads. Documents fetch as /LFPortalinternet/0/edoc/{doc_id}/x.pdf (doc_id from the link's id= param).
second_source.what_it_affirms: Minutes narrate each motion (mover, seconder, outcome, named dissents/abstentions/absences) independently of the Action Report's tabular summary. Minutes for the newest 1-2 meetings may not exist yet (approved at a subsequent meeting) — skip those, do not guess.
second_source.superseded_note: Earlier profile pointed at Action Report Books — those compile the primary's own documents (circular), and the archived Minute Books / Copy Teste Books end in 2019/2018. Verified 2026-07-10.

votes_located: Per-item votes (motions, movers, seconders, and vote outcomes) are captured in eScribe for Standing Committee meetings. The eScribe Meeting.aspx page for each meeting includes CSS classes: .MotionText, .AgendaItemMotion, .MovedBy, .SecondedBy, .MotionVot — indicating structured per-item vote data rendered in HTML. Example: Finance/Government Operations & Economic Development Committee meeting July 14 2026 (Meeting.aspx?Id=5cefff5d-2b42-4aa7-9598-c549cc7b849f) shows items like '3.a Monthly Department of Economic Development Report … Election District(s): Countywide … Staff Contact(s): Buddy Rizer'. For BOS Business Meetings, vote outcomes appear in the PDF Action Reports stored in Laserfiche (fol/115347), produced within 2 business days of each meeting.

systems_surveyed.status: ACTIVE — confirmed live; hosts Finance/Government Operations & Economic Development Committee and Transportation and Land Use Committee meetings; current meeting July 2026 verified
systems_surveyed.era_covered: Current (2024–present); described by county as 'new platform' for BOS and Planning Commission materials

systems_surveyed.status: ACTIVE — iframe embedded in loudoun.gov/3426 (BOS Business Meetings, fol/98907) and loudoun.gov/3436 (Action Reports, fol/115347); URL confirmed in page source
systems_surveyed.era_covered: Action Reports 1991–present; Copy Teste Books 1954–present; Minute Books 1870–present

systems_surveyed.status: LEGACY — accessible but only contains records for ancillary committees (Administrative Operations Committee, Emergency Management, Fire Operations, etc.) from 2014–2016; NOT used for main BOS
HTTP 500 — LegistarConnectionString-style error (client slug 'loudoun' may be registered but API is disabled or misconfigured; /meetings endpoint returned 404)
Returns 'Invalid parameters!' — site exists at the host but is not a functional public portal
DNS does not resolve — not a tenant
BOS meetings NOT present in AgendaCenter; only minor committee archives

access_constraints: No authentication required for eScribe public portal or Laserfiche WebLink portal. eScribe calendar is rendered client-side via FullCalendar JS; the MeetingsCalendarView.aspx/GetCalendarMeetings POST endpoint returns empty JSON arrays (data is baked into the initial HTML page load). Laserfiche documents are served via a frames-based WebLink interface — individual document URLs require navigating folder tree. No Cloudflare or captcha blocks detected on either primary system.
open_questions: The Laserfiche WebLink portal (lfportal.loudoun.gov/LFPortalinternet/0/fol/98907) was not directly fetched before budget exhausted — confirm it is publicly accessible without login and enumerate its subfolder/document structure.

eScribe's main calendar only shows two Standing Committee types; confirm whether full BOS Business Meetings (not just committees) will appear in eScribe going forward or remain exclusively in Laserfiche.
The Legistar 'loudoun' slug returned a 500 error — determine whether Loudoun ever used Legistar historically and whether any Legistar records pre-date the current eScribe/Laserfiche setup.

Loudoun County webcast system URL was referenced (for meeting video) but not identified — determine the video platform (likely a Granicus/MediaSite/YouTube channel) and whether timestamped vote segments are accessible.

eScribe POST endpoint GetCalendarMeetings returns empty arrays — confirm whether a different parameter format (e.g., different date format or additional body fields) can unlock paginated JSON meeting lists for automated enumeration.
Verify the era boundary: when exactly did eScribe replace the previous system for Standing Committee documents?
